category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/Talinx/jp2a says jp2a is a JPEG/PNG/WebP to ASCII converter.
source_facts.description says 'Convert JPG images to ASCII'.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses 'jp2a' at https://github.com/Talinx/jp2a.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface and includes project description and usage-related files.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/Talinx/jp2a, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README expands supported input formats to JPEG/PNG/WebP and ASCII output.
